name: Alicetaria February
nativeName: アリステリア・フェブラリィ
description: A noble's daughter and the protagonist of the fantasy epic manga and anime franchise "Alicetaria of the Scarlet". A brash and heroic warrior who only wishes to save her people, she supports the Military Uniform Princess, and expresses intense hatred towards her Creator for making her world into such a dark setting for the sake of entertainment. She fights using a lance and can use powerful magical blasts. She can also summon and ride a Pegasus.

name: Boothill
description: A cyborg cowboy drifting among the stars. Extremely optimistic and unrestrained. He is a member of the Galaxy Rangers who swore to punish the wretched by any and all means... His flamboyant and brash actions were all to draw the attention of the Interastral Peace Corporation -- the target of his revenge.
mediaTitles: Honkai: Star Rail - On the Journey

name: Catesby
description: Childhood friend and ally of Richard.

name: Ciel Lionheart
description: Ciel Lionheart is the daughter of Gilead Lionheart and the twin sister of Cyan Lionheart. She is a member of the direct line of the Lionheart family.

name: Cima Garahau
description: Cima Garahau is a character from "Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory". She was originally a pilot and marine commander in the Zeon military but following the One Year War ended up operating as a pirate. In the series 0083 Cima and her eponymous fleet join the Delaz fleet to take part in Operation Stardust against the Earth Federation.
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: The Afterglow Of Zeon
Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory -  Mayfly of Space

name: Denshichirou Yoshioka
description: Seijuurou's younger brother, though completely dedicated to his swordsmanship. Blames the school's dwindling reputation on account of Seijuurou's cavorting. He fought with Musashi at Rengeoin temple.

name: Donkey Kong
description: Donkey Kong, also known as DK, is a powerful hero Kong from Donkey Kong Island. In fact, there have been two separate Donkey Kongs. The original Donkey Kong from the Donkey Kong arcade game eventually became Cranky Kong, while his son (Donkey Kong Jr.) or grandson became the current Donkey Kong. (Nintendo frequently back-pedals on this issue, however. name: Gina
description: The owner of the famous Hotel Adriano. It is said that everyone, flying pirates, spies, smugglers, all behave only when Gina is around. She has a beautiful voice, and often performs at her restaurant for her guests. She is a childhood friend of Marco Paggot. At the wedding of her first marriage, to Belenldi, Marco was the best man. Belenldi was killed while on a mission with Marco, two days after their wedding. Gina’s married twice more, all pilots, but they too were killed. During the day

name: Ginger Torte
description: Noble daughter of a marquess, lifelong rival of Lerajie. Knows Prince Izanas secret.

name: Gotou Hidenori
description: A police officer working a police box. He's diligent about his work in the police box, but he's normal, average young man with no particular feelings towards justice in his private life. One day he happens to learn about the hero of justice, Samurai Flamenco, by chance. Ever since then his days have been more chaotic...

name: Gouki
description: Gouki is a vicious and aggressive fighter who fights only to test his strength against his opponents. However, being a strict upholder of the code of the warrior, he usually only fights those who challenge him instead of picking fights.
mediaTitles: TONIKAWA: Over The Moon For You

name: Haruka Niimi
description: __Affiliation:__ Kouga Academy, Class 2-B Haruka is Kazuya's childhood friend. However, due to them both growing up and Haruka becoming more popular among the students, they have drifted apart over the years. Even so, it still seems as if they want to re-kindle their lost friendship.

She is formerly known as the Queen of Light. She is kindhearted and lovable queen. She stood up to her subjects and willing to protect her people from evil such as the current King of Darkness. name: Ibuki Ikaruga
description: One of the things which is readily noticeable about her is that she is very well endowed. Currently the instructor of the Ikaruga Dojo teaching Ukiha Kamikaze. Ibuki also attends Yoku-Ryou Gakuen Private High School with the main characters, and just happens to be in the same class as Yoichi. She has feelings for Yoichi.

name: Iris Freyja
description: The female protagonist and the deviant of class Brynhildr. Her dark matter fictional weapon is a magic staff called Caduceus.
